intervals.name: Warmup
intervals.purpose: Prepare system and elevate heart rate

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 10:00 at 75%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 0/4. 75% FTP, Seated. 10:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 0% through. This is your workout. Own it. 75% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 75% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 0% into session. 75%, 85-95 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: First rep. 90% FTP. Your body is uncomfortable. Your mind is stronger. Prove it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1/8. 90-90% FTP, 88-95 rpm, Seated. Execute with precision.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Interval 1/8. You're starting fresh. Show yourself what you're capable of.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/8. 8:00 at 90%. This seemed like a good idea. We'll see.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 8:00 at 90%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 2/8. 0:30 at 200%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 200% FTP, Alternating. 30s. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 200%, 88-95 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 2/8. 200% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: Rep 2/8. 200% FTP, 88-95 rpm. Controlled effort. Execute the plan.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 1/1. 4:00 at 55%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Set 1/4. 55% FTP, Seated. 4:00. Maintain smooth power output.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 4:00 at 55%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 1/1. 55% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Rep 3/8. 8:00 at 90%. This is the price of being better. Pay it.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 32% complete. Rep 3/8. 90% at 82-90 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 32% through. This is your workout. Own it. 90% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Rep 3/8. 90% FTP. Your legs filed a complaint. It's under review. (It's not.)
coachingNotes.MIXED: 32% into session. 90%, 82-90 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Final interval. 200% for 30s. Then 39min cooldown. Leave nothing.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: First interval. 200% for 30s. Set the standard. You've got this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 4/8. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: 43% into session. 200%, 82-90 rpm. Focus and execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: You're here because you want to be better. 55%, 85-95 rpm. This is how.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Seated at 85-95 rpm, 45-55% FTP. Lock in.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 31 minutes of work done. 35 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. Your legs have opinions. Management has reviewed them. Denied.
coachingNotes.MIXED: First rep: 4:00 at 55%. Smooth and controlled. Lock in form.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/8. 8:00 at 90%. This hurts because it's supposed to. Set the tone.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: First rep: 8:00 at 90%. Focus on form and controlled execution.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Stay focused and execute the plan. 90%, 75-85 rpm. You've trained for this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: First rep. Your legs feel fresh. Check back in 8:00.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1/8. Power: 90-90%, Cadence: 75-85 rpm, Position: Seated. Execute.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 6/8. 43 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 6 of 8. Target: 200% FTP, 75-85 rpm. 2 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 61% through. This is your workout. Own it. 200% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 61% done. 2 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 6. 2 to go. 26 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 62% done. 0 intervals left. 22 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 25min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 62% done. 0 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 62% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 22 minutes total. You've got this.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 7/8. 67% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 7 of 8. Target: 90% FTP, 95-105 rpm. 1 intervals remaining.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 67% done. 1 intervals left. You've come this far. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 7/8. 47 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 1 reps left.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 8/8. 79% through. Pain is temporary. Regret lasts forever. Finish this.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Final interval: 200% × 30s. Then 14min easy. Finish strong.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: Final interval! 30s at 200%. Then you're done. Make it count.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Final interval. 200% for 30s. Then 14min to question life choices.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Final interval. 200% × 30s. Alternating, 95-105 rpm. Finish what you started.

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: Interval 1/1. 56 minutes in. Your legs are lying. You have more.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: Interval 1. 34min of work accumulated. Quality over quantity from here.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 80% through. This is your workout. Own it. 55% FTP.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: 80% done. 0 intervals left. Only. ONLY. *nervous laughter*

intervals.name: Cool-down
intervals.purpose: Gradually lower heart rate and begin recovery

coachingNotes.TOUGH_LOVE: 85% done. 0 intervals left. 0 minutes total. Don't quit now.
coachingNotes.TECHNICAL: 85% complete. Rep 1/1. 60% at 85-95 rpm. Hold form — don't let it drift.
coachingNotes.MOTIVATIONAL: 60 minutes of work done. 0 minutes to go. You can do this.
coachingNotes.DARK_HUMOR: Interval 1/1. 60 minutes in. The good news: almost done. The bad news: 0 reps left.
coachingNotes.MIXED: Interval 1. 0 to go. 0 minutes total. You've got this.
